tasks.subject: Task 1: lib/calendar.ts — grid & day-state logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The pure functions the Calendar needs — month layout, month navigation, the night-dates selector, and per-day state — fully unit-tested.

**Files:** Create mobile/lib/calendar.ts; Test mobile/lib/calendar.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** monthGrid weekday-offset blanks + zero-padded {iso,day} cells; shiftMonth Dec/Jan rollover; nightDates dedupes to a Set; dayState suppresses hasNight under selection and daysUntil===0 is not past; single-file test passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/calendar.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/calendar.ts", "mobile/lib/calendar.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/calendar.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["monthGrid returns weekday-offset blanks then zero-padded {iso,day} cells", "shiftMonth rolls across Dec/Jan year boundary", "nightDates dedupes scheduledFor into a Set", "dayState suppresses hasNight under selection and treats daysUntil===0 as not past", "single-file test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: lib/nightFlow.ts — scheduled resume branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the when/scheduled step values and resume a future, picker-locked night onto the Scheduled screen, leaving today's behaviour otherwise intact.

**Files:** Modify mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts; Test mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** Step includes when and scheduled; deriveInitialStep returns scheduled only for future+picker else recorded/who; today injectable defaulting to todayLocalISO(); single-file test passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nightFlow.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts", "mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nightFlow.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Step includes when and scheduled", "deriveInitialStep returns scheduled only for future+picker, else recorded/who", "today is injectable, defaults to todayLocalISO()", "single-file test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: components/Calendar.tsx — month picker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A presentational month calendar that renders monthGrid/dayState output with Spotlight styling and reports taps; no data, no business logic.

**Files:** Create mobile/components/Calendar.tsx; Modify mobile/components/index.ts (export Calendar)

**Acceptance Criteria:** Props value/today/month/nightDates/onPick/onMonth; serif header + IconButton chevrons + mono weekday row + 7-col grid; day visuals match dayState; past days tappable; theme tokens only.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/Calendar.tsx", "mobile/components/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Props value/today/month/nightDates/onPick/onMonth; serif header + chevrons + weekday row + 7-col grid", "day visuals match dayState (selected/today/past/hasNight)", "past days tappable; onPick/onMonth fire", "theme tokens only"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Extract wizard steps to components/night/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the three existing step views plus shared Stepper/WizardFooter out of app/night/new.tsx into components/night/, behaviour unchanged (still tonight-only), so the container is lean before the new steps land.

**Files:** Create mobile/components/night/{Stepper,WizardFooter,WhoStep,PickStep,RecordedStep,index}.ts(x); Modify mobile/app/night/new.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** five steps/chrome live in components/night/ each with own StyleSheet; new.tsx imports the 3 steps from ../../components/night and defines none of them; tonight flow unchanged; just check passes. MOVE verbatim — only in-body edit is barrel import ../../components → ../.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/night/Stepper.tsx", "mobile/components/night/WizardFooter.tsx", "mobile/components/night/WhoStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/PickStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/RecordedStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/index.ts", "mobile/app/night/new.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["five steps/chrome live in components/night/ each with own StyleSheet", "new.tsx imports steps from ../../components/night and defines none of them", "tonight flow unchanged; just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: When step + Calendar entry-point wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the Start-tonight intro with the When step (Tonight chip + Calendar + footer); fetch night dates for dots; create the night for the chosen date and enter the flow. Tonight path works end-to-end.

**Files:** Create mobile/components/night/WhenStep.tsx; Modify Stepper.tsx (4 labels), WhoStep/PickStep (bump current), components/night/index.ts, mobile/app/night/new.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** When renders Tonight chip + Calendar + footer (PLANNING/TONIGHT + relativeLabel + Next); dots from listNights, failure degrades to no dots; Next creates the night and advances to Who; Tonight still reaches Recorded; Stepper shows 4 steps, When is 0.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check (then just start manual smoke)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/night/WhenStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/Stepper.tsx", "mobile/components/night/WhoStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/PickStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/index.ts", "mobile/app/night/new.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["When step renders Tonight chip + Calendar + footer (PLANNING/TONIGHT + relativeLabel + Next)", "dots from listNights; listNights failure degrades to no dots", "Next creates night for selected date and advances to Who; Tonight path still reaches Recorded", "Stepper shows 4 steps, When is 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Scheduled branch — date-aware Who + Scheduled screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Branch the flow on the date — a future night reframes attendance to Who's coming?, locks the picker, skips film search, and lands on the Scheduled ✓ screen; tonight unchanged. Resume a scheduled night onto that screen.

**Files:** Create mobile/components/night/ScheduledStep.tsx; Modify WhoStep.tsx (date-aware), components/night/index.ts, mobile/app/night/new.tsx (branch + render + resume)

**Acceptance Criteria:** future: Who reframed to coming + Schedule CTA + relative badge heading, tonight unchanged; future advance records picker then Scheduled (hero/picker/cluster/Done), tonight reaches Recorded; re-open resumes Scheduled via deriveInitialStep; no repeat chip / add-to-calendar / notify.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check (then just start manual smoke)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/night/ScheduledStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/WhoStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/index.ts", "mobile/app/night/new.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["future: Who reframed to coming + Schedule CTA + relative badge heading; tonight unchanged", "future advance records picker then lands on Scheduled (hero/picker/cluster/Done); tonight reaches Recorded", "re-open resumes Scheduled via deriveInitialStep", "no repeat chip / add-to-calendar / notify"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
